<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Math; use Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Abstract\AbstractFunctionReplaceMutator; class MaxToMin extends AbstractFunctionReplaceMutator { public const SET = 'Math'; public const DESCRIPTION = 'Replaces `max` function with `min` function.'; public const DIFF = <<<'DIFF' $a = max(1, 2); // [tl! remove] $a = min(1, 2); // [tl! add] DIFF; public static function from(): string { return 'max'; } public static function to(): string { return 'min'; } }
